column1: # Test user accounts for the App Store demo server. Tab-separated.
# Created by `seed-users` after the first admin has been bootstrapped
#   username         Bare username (NOT an email — the auth layer
#   display_name     Shown in the profile / Now Playing surfaces.
#                    Currently unused by the user-create endpoint
#                    is removed from the schema entirely); kept here
#   password_env     Name of the env var in secrets/.env that holds
# Lines beginning with '#' or blank are ignored.
# Note: the very first admin still has to come from the /setup
# wizard — admin-create requires an existing admin to authenticate.
# DEMO_ADMIN_PASSWORD in secrets/.env) and creates the rest.
# given to Apple App Review. They are never used by us — the
# screenshot pipeline uses viewer/kid/empty so a reviewer-credential
# rotation can't break our capture flow. reviewer-kid is set to TV-Y
# (level 0, the strictest) to demonstrate the rating gate at full
# restriction. Apple-shared accounts get force_change=false so the
# reviewer doesn't hit a password-change gate on first login, but
# their terms_of_use_accepted_at stays NULL so the ToS dialog still
